title: Parry it!
description: Adds the parry mechanic from Ultrakill.
body:
Parry it! allows you to parry almost ANYTHING in the game, you can parry fall damage to create explosions or parry ghast fireballs and arrows to send them back. Is a creeper about to blow up next to you? Parry it. Is a zombie hitting you? Parry it. Did you fall in lava? P a r r y  I t.

Highly customizable from the config.

WARNING: CONTAINS FLASHING LIGHTS.

Logo by @starsocrazyy on X

Heavily inspired by Ultrakill.

"Why would you use a shield when you have a parry? That's just a boring version of a parry."
